ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Minimisation was enforced in payroll exports

must_detect.matched_text:
Internal MNPI review: draft green bond term sheet for HOSE listing and Q2 unaudited results remained in restricted folders; checks under the Securities Law confirm no non-public issuer information was transmitted.
DSAR received from Ms. Nguyen Thi Mai on 29 May 2026 requesting access and correction; identity verified, disclosure delivered on 31 May, and correction to job title logged; retention marker RET-180d applied to her onboarding artefacts.
Marketing consent withdrawal by Mr. Le Quang Huy via dpo@thanh-lien-horizon.vn on 30 May; optional CRM profile fields were erased, and outbound marketing flags set to “off”; core employment data remained per lawful basis.
Minimisation was enforced in payroll exports (masked account tokens and role-only fields); legacy form fields “Personal Notes” were deprecated and removed from active templates.
Treasury batch review shows vendor payments recorded with pseudonymised supplier IDs and masked beneficiary tokens; no live transaction authorisation data persisted beyond the retention gate.
DPA Schedule 4 (Annex: Data Categories & Retention) updated to reflect removal of deprecated fields and cross-border log retention capped at 90 days; audit trail stored in VN-only enclave.
Operational note (ESG): solar site inverter telemetry was unaffected and contains no PII; incident response involved only IT and HR records, with no environmental reporting gap.
Regulatory posture: SSC notification was not triggered; IR team documented the event and confirms no obligation to file an immediate HOSE disclosure given absence of MNPI impact.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
